products.name: KAIVO Signature Black Tee
products.description: Premium heavyweight 240 GSM oversized tee featuring a clean premium logo print. Detailed stitching with ribbed crew neck. Made of 100% combed cotton, bio-washed for extreme comfort and longevity.

products.name: KAIVO White Minimal Tee
products.description: Clean, simple and premium logo white T-shirt. Extremely breathable 240 GSM organic cotton with an flawless oversized drop-shoulder fit.

products.name: KAIVO Wings Graphic Tee
products.description: Bold graphic back-print featuring our signature wings illustration. Made from 240 GSM long-staple combed cotton with high-fidelity screen print.

products.name: KAIVO Sand Beige Tee
products.description: A refined aesthetic neutral oversized tee in high-quality 240 GSM bio-washed cotton. Exceptional earth tone finish with extreme comfort.

products.name: KAIVO Brown Essential Tee
products.description: Deep rich cocoa brown streetwear tee. Minimal branding on the front chest and premium oversized drop shoulders.

products.name: KAIVO Confidence Print Tee
products.description: 'Confidence is Silent' screen print back detailing. Made from pre-shrunk, bio-washed premium single-jersey 100% cotton.

products.name: KAIVO Crest Black Tee
products.description: Embroidered medieval crest logo on the front left chest. A clean, sophisticated streetwear staple built in 240 GSM loopback jersey cotton.

products.name: KAIVO Minimal Grey Tee
products.description: Perfect heather grey oversized t-shirt. Clean aesthetics and premium comfort fabric. Soft brushed cotton that stays perfect wash after wash.

products.name: KAIVO Circle Back Tee
products.description: Abstract circular geometry front pocket print and giant high-definition back print. Perfect for styling with dark cargo or denim pants.

products.name: KAIVO Olive Green Tee
products.description: Rich military-inspired dark olive green shade. Subtle high-density branding on neck cuff. Built using combed premium-grade heavy cotton.

products.name: KAIVO Embroidered Tee
products.description: Symmetrical luxury typography embroidered across the front chest with over 20,000 premium stitches. Stiff ribbed mock neck collars.

products.name: KAIVO Abstract Print Tee
products.description: Bold abstract illustration combining gothic typography with surreal artwork. A true limited edition drop item from our premier season.

about.title: WEAR CONFIDENCE
about.subtitle: ABOUT KAIVO
about.storyTitle: BUILT ON SIMPLICITY. DRIVEN BY PURPOSE.
about.story:
KAIVO is more than just a clothing brand. It's a mindset. We create premium oversized T-Shirts that speak minimalism, comfort, and confidence. Every piece is designed to make you feel your best, every day.

KAIVO was born from the idea that style doesn't have to be loud to stand out. We started with a simple goal - to create oversized tees that feel good, look timeless, and make you feel confident in your own skin. Every piece is designed with attention to detail, crafted from premium fabrics, and made to be your everyday essential.

features.title: PREMIUM QUALITY
features.description: We use high-grade fabrics that are soft, durable, and made to last.

features.title: OVERSIZED FIT
features.description: Designed for comfort and freedom. Our fit is relaxed, modern, and effortless.

features.title: MINIMAL DESIGN
features.description: Clean aesthetics, subtle branding, and timeless pieces that never go out of style.

features.title: MADE WITH PURPOSE
features.description: Every collection is a reflection of our belief - wear what makes you feel like your best self.

craftedToLast.title: QUALITY YOU CAN FEEL
craftedToLast.description: From the fabric we choose to the way it's stitched, we focus on quality in every step. Because we believe your everyday tee should be anything but ordinary.

contact.title: WE'D LOVE TO HEAR FROM YOU
